title: Barclays exploring blockchain settlement tools as banks brace for stablecoin growth: Bloomberg
message_html: Barclays exploring blockchain settlement tools as banks brace for stablecoin growth: Bloomberg ...
snippet: Barclays has previously invested in stablecoin settlement infrastructure and consortium efforts, signaling an infrastructure-first approach rather than direct token issuance.
